title: ニュー・ウマドル誕生？

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! ☆ Another day, another concert... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Urara, la la la! ♪ Ura, Ura, Ura! ♪ Uuura la!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Urara! Whatcha doing?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hi, Falco! Well, I was just copying you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Cause you see... I wanna be just like you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! Really?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I mean, you're super fast and super good at
singing and dancing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So if I keep acting like you, first place won't be a
dream anymore! I'll get to dance really well, right
in center stage!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So it's Urara, la la la! ♪
Uraraaa, laaa la la! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! Finally, Urara is a follower! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urara! If that's your goal... I'll teach you how to
become an Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: From underground to mainstream, from turf to dirt, I'll let you in on everything that made me me! You ready for my crash course?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I have no idea, but sure! Sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two... Urara, la!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Urara, la!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ura, Ura?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ura, Ura!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ura, Ura, Ura, Ura...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Haru, Urara, la laaa! ♪ I love everyone, but also
carrots! Haru Urara's the name, and first place is
my game!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're doing great, Urara! This time, let's make it
super cutesy-wutesy! ☆
